_note: Reviewer item #3c (string-literal event variables): `dispatch(EV, …)` where `EV` is `const EV = 'click'` now contributes 'click' to the synthesised event set. Pre-fix only direct string-literal args were collected. Bubbled DOM events from bare `on:NAME` directives are tracked separately as a follow-up — they need a different emission path (DOM event types, no CustomEvent wrap).
